nodes.label: WPL Fantasy League Homepage UI Screenshot

metadata.description: Dark-themed mobile-first responsive dashboard for a Women's Premier League fantasy football application. Uses a 2-column grid on mobile, 4-column on desktop. Features a top header bar with WPL logo, 'WPL Fantasy' title, notification bell, and settings button. Bottom mobile navigation with 5 tabs: Home, League, My Team, H2H, Stats. Dashboard is composed of card-based widgets arranged in a grid layout with purple (#A855F7) accent color scheme and deep dark background (#120C22).

nodes.norm_label: wpl fantasy league homepage ui screenshot

metadata.description: Full-width card at top of dashboard showing team name, managers, overall rank with rank change indicator, total points, and gameweek points. Tapping navigates to /my-team.
Full-width card displaying upcoming match fixtures for the user's team, showing gameweek and fixture details.
Half-width card showing four league stats: Total Managers (with Users icon), GW Average (indigo), Highest Points (pink), Total Teams (rose). Each stat has a colored circle icon container.
Half-width card displaying current gameweek number, deadline label, and start/end date range. Includes a crown badge icon.
Half-width card showing top 3 teams in league standings with the user's team highlighted. Includes 'View Full' link to /standings.
Half-width card featuring a spotlighted player with photo, name, club, position, form history, gameweek points, and detailed stats.
Card listing top scoring players of the current gameweek with name, team, position, and points.
Card listing best performing players of the entire season with name, team, position, and total points.
Card showing recent gameweek performance history with labeled points per gameweek (e.g. GW1, GW2, etc.).

Card showing total points and a breakdown by category: Goals (green), Assists (blue), Clean Sheets (indigo), Appearance (yellow), Defensive (teal), Penalty Save (emerald), Saves (violet), Yellow Cards (amber), Red Cards (red), Penalty Miss (orange). Each category shows value and percentage bar.
Card showing four season statistics: Total Points (Target icon), Avg Points/GW (Activity icon), Highest GW (ShieldCheck icon), Overall Rank (Square icon).
Full-width card displaying the user's squad formation visually (e.g. 4-4-2) with count of goalkeepers, defenders, midfielders, and forwards.
Half-width card showing squad financial information: total value, remaining bank, and team value in GBP millions.
Half-width card showing number of selected players out of 15 total, with a CTA button navigating to /my-team.
Full-width card at the bottom of the dashboard displaying fantasy league news and updates.
Sticky top header with WPL logo (dark/light variants), 'WPL Fantasy' title text, notification bell icon with unread dot, and user profile/settings button. Dark surface background with border divider.

Fixed bottom navigation bar with 5 tabs for regular users: Home, League, My Team, H2H, Stats. Each tab has a custom SVG icon and label. Active tab highlighted in purple (#A855F7). Dark background (#120C22) with top border. Hidden on desktop (lg+) where SideNavbar is used instead.

Header is rendered by MainLayout, not HomePage directly
All dashboard cards arranged in a 2-column (mobile) / 4-column (desktop) responsive grid using Tailwind CSS grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-2.5 lg:gap-5
Dark color scheme with background #120C22, surface cards, purple accent #A855F7, white text, and subtle borders using CSS custom properties and Tailwind utility classes
